//: Type-checks the browser client modules (DOM lib) — the L4 goal: client JS visible to tsc. Excluded from the package's main tsconfig (which is Node, no DOM). esbuild does the actual transpile/bundle; this is noEmit type-checking only.
//exclude: Override the package tsconfig's `exclude: [src/client]` (which it inherits via extends) — that would otherwise exclude this config's own inputs.
